zh.lifeSummary: 當Wenceslaus Wenzel Luben於1318年出生在波蘭萊瓦福斯吉萊格尼尼次吉時，他的父親Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast III27歲，母親Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclaw22歲。他於1341年2月8日之前與Duchess Anna Piast of Cieszyn-Legnica結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1364年6月2日在波蘭享年46歲，埋葬在波蘭多爾諾希利a斯吉萊格尼尼次吉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Wenceslaus Wenzel Luben于1318年出生在波兰萊瓦福斯吉萊格尼尼次吉时，他的父亲Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast III27岁，母亲Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclaw22岁。他于1341年2月8日之前与Duchess Anna Piast of Cieszyn-Legnica结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1364年6月2日在波兰享年46岁，埋葬在波兰多爾諾希利a斯吉萊格尼尼次吉。

nameMeanings.name: Luben
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Monique, Alain, Andree, Jean Charles, Jean-Claude, Julienne, Marie Ange, Michel, Micheline, Regine, Solange.  Jewish Hyman, Emanuel, Meyer, Moshe, Shmuel, Dovid, Isador, Moise, Myer, Riv, Shlomo.

French and Haitian: from the French personal name Lubin, which is from the ancient Germanic name Leobin, a pet form of any of the compound names formed with leub, liup, liob ‘dear, beloved’ as the first element. Saint Leobin was a bishop of Chartres in the 6th century (whence the name's popularity in the Middle Ages), and several places were named Saint-Lubin after him, as for example in Eure, Eure-et-Loir, and Loir-et-Cher.
Jewish (from Belarus): habitational name from Lyubin and Lyubny, now in Belarus.

nameMeanings.name: Wenceslaus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of an East European Slavic name, composed of the elements ventie ‘more, greater’ + slav ‘glory’. St Wenceslas was a 10th-century duke of Bohemia noted for his piety, the grandson of St Ludmilla . He is regarded as the patron of Bohemia. This was also the name of four kings of Bohemia in the period covering the 13th to the 15th century.

nameMeanings.name: Wenzel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Wenceslaus Wenzel Luben was born in 1318, in Legnica, Wrocław, Poland, his father, Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast III, was 27 and his mother, Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclaw, was 22. He married Duchess Anna Piast of Cieszyn-Legnica before 8 February 1341. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 2 June 1364, in Poland, at the age of 46, and was buried in Legnica, Lower Silesia, Poland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Wenceslaus Wenzel Luben est né en 1318, à Legnicki, wrocławskie, Pologne, son père, Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast III, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclaw, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Duchess Anna Piast of Cieszyn-Legnica avant 8 février 1341. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 2 juin 1364, à Pologne, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Legnicki, dolnośląskie, Pologne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Wenceslaus Wenzel Luben 1318 in Legnicki, wrocławskie, Polen geboren wurde, war sein Vater Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast III 27 und seine Mutter Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclaw 22. Er hat vor 8. Februar 1341 Duchess Anna Piast of Cieszyn-Legnica geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 2. Juni 1364 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Polen und wurde in Legnicki, Niederschlesien, Polen begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Wenceslaus Wenzel Luben è nato il nel 1318 nel Legnicki, wrocławskie, Polonia, il suo padre, Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast III, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclaw, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Duchess Anna Piast of Cieszyn-Legnica prima del 8 febbraio 1341. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 2 giugno 1364, nel Polonia, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Legnicki, dolnośląskie, Polonia.

ja.lifeSummary: Wenceslaus Wenzel Lubenが1318年にポーランドウロクlアウスキレグニクイで生まれた時，父Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast IIIは27歳，母Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclawは22歳であった。1341年2月8日以前にDuchess Anna Piast of Cieszyn-Legnicaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1364年6月2日にポーランドで46歳で死去し，ポーランドドルノsルaスキレグニクイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Wenceslaus Wenzel Luben(이)가 1318년 폴란드 록l아w스키 레그닉키에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast III(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclaw(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1341년 2월 8일 이전 Duchess Anna Piast of Cieszyn-Legnica(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1364년 6월 2일 폴란드에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 폴란드 도노sa스키 레그닉키에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Wenceslaus Wenzel Luben nasceu em 1318, em Legnicki, wrocławskie, Polônia, seu pai, Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast III, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclaw, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Duchess Anna Piast of Cieszyn-Legnica antes 8 de fevereiro de 1341. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 2 de junho de 1364, em Polônia, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Legnicki, dolnośląskie, Polônia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Wenceslaus Wenzel Luben родился в 1318 г. в местности легникки, рокlавски, Польша, его отцу по имени Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast III было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclaw, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Duchess Anna Piast of Cieszyn-Legnica перед 8 февраль 1341 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 2 июня 1364 г. в местности Польша в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности легникки, долноsлaски, Польша.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Wenceslaus Wenzel Luben nació en 1318, en Legnicki, wrocławskie, Polonia, su papá, Boleslaw "the Wasteful" Piast III, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Margaret Of Bohemia duchess of wroclaw, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Duchess Anna Piast of Cieszyn-Legnica antes de 8 de febrero de 1341. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 2 de junio de 1364, en Polonia, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Legnicki, dolnośląskie, Polonia.
